7. Lookup and enrich and enrich an email address
Lookup and enrich an email address.
Base Command
email
Input

!ip ip="10.200.104.236"
Human Readable Output
7. Lookup and enrich and enrich an email address
Lookup and enrich an email address.
Base Command
email
Input
Argument Name
name: email

outputs.description: Device ID associated with the specified email address AwakeSecurity.Emails.deviceName Device name associated with the specified email address
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Emails.deviceId

outputs.description: Date that the email address was first seen in Awake Security AwakeSecurity.Emails.lastSeen Date that the email address was last seen in Awake Security
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Emails.firstSeen

outputs.description: Time (in seconds) between the email address first seen date and last seen date in Awake Security AwakeSecurity.Emails.os Operating system of the device associated with the specified email address
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Emails.duration

outputs.description: Device type associated with the specified email address AwakeSecurity.Emails.ips IP addresses that the device associated with the specified email address accessed
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Emails.deviceType

outputs.description: Monitoring point IDs on which the device associated with the specified email address were seen AwakeSecurity.Emails.application Email applications associated with this email address
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Emails.monitoringPointIds

outputs.description: Notability (risk score) of the specified email address AwakeSecurity.Emails.numberSimilarDevices Number of similar devices associated with the device of the specified email addresses
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Emails.notabilityPercentile

outputs.description: Number of TCP sessions the device associated with this email address initiated AwakeSecurity.Emails.ackTime Date of the last TCP session acknowledgment of the device associated with the specified email address
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Emails.numberSessions

outputs.description: bool Is the device associated with the specified email address in the allow list DBotScore.Score
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Emails.whiteListed

outputs.description: Severity score of the specified email address in Cortex XSOAR DBotScore.Type Indicator type in Cortex XSOAR
outputs.name: number

outputs.description: Vendor used to assess the specified email address DBotScore.Indicator
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
